productDisplayName: Clarks Men Rocco Fuse Leather Grey Casual Shoes
description: Blending classic style with a laidback Sports influence, this Rocco Fuse leather shoe from clarks delivers a contemporary look with absolute comfort. The flexible sole that offers all-day wearability, this modern shoe can be worn barefoot as well for that stylish edge.UpperFull leather upper with stitch detailing and toe box overlay for absolute durability, breath ability, comfort and styleLacing system with trims for eyelets offering a snug, customized FitHairsheep inner lining for absolute comfort and abrasion-free liningBrand badge on lateral ankle for stylePU foxing for durabilityMidsolePU midsole for lightweight, flexible comfortCushioned footbed for all-day comfort OutsoleDurable rubber panels stacked together to create the outsole for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustBrush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
